# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

_format_version: "3.0"
_transform: true

plugins:
  - name: cors
    enabled: true
    config:
      origins:
        - "https://app.example.com"
        - "https://admin.example.com"
        - "https://portal.example.com"
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - PATCH
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
      headers:
        - Accept
        - Authorization
        - Content-Type
        - Origin
        - X-Requested-With
        - X-Correlation-Id
      exposed_headers:
        - X-Correlation-Id
        - X-RateLimit-Limit-Minute
        - X-RateLimit-Remaining-Minute
        - X-RateLimit-Reset-Minute
      credentials: true
      max_age: 3600
      preflight_continue: false

  - name: key-auth
    enabled: true
    config:
      key_names:
        - apikey
        - x-api-key
      hide_credentials: true
      anonymous: null
      key_in_header: true
      key_in_query: false
      key_in_body: false
      run_on_preflight: false

  - name: rate-limiting
    enabled: true
    config:
      minute: 1000
      hour: 20000
      policy: local
      fault_tolerant: true
      hide_client_headers: false
      limit_by: consumer

services:
  - name: users-service
    url: http://users-upstream:8080
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        enabled: true
        config:
          origins:
            - "https://app.example.com"
            - "https://admin.example.com"
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - PATCH
            - DELETE
            - OPTIONS
          headers:
            - Accept
            - Authorization
            - Content-Type
            - Origin
            - X-Requested-With
          exposed_headers:
            - X-Correlation-Id
          credentials: true
          max_age: 3600
          preflight_continue: false

      - name: jwt
        enabled: true
        config:
          uri_param_names:
            - jwt
          cookie_names: []
          claims_to_verify:
            - exp
          key_claim_name: iss
          secret_is_base64: false
          run_on_preflight: false

      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true
        config:
          minute: 500
          hour: 10000
          policy: local
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false
          limit_by: consumer

    routes:
      - name: users-public-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/users/public
        strip_path: false
        methods:
          - GET
          - OPTIONS
        plugins:
          - name: cors
            enabled: true
            config:
              origins:
                - "https://app.example.com"
                - "https://portal.example.com"
              methods:
                - GET
                - OPTIONS
              headers:
                - Accept
                - Authorization
                - Content-Type
                - Origin
              exposed_headers:
                - X-Correlation-Id
              credentials: true
              max_age: 1800
              preflight_continue: false

          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              minute: 200
              hour: 5000
              policy: local
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false
              limit_by: ip

      - name: users-private-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/users
        strip_path: false
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
          - OPTIONS
        plugins:
          - name: cors
            enabled: true
            config:
              origins:
                - "https://app.example.com"
                - "https://admin.example.com"
              methods:
                - GET
                - POST
                - PUT
                - PATCH
                - DELETE
                - OPTIONS
              headers:
                - Accept
                - Authorization
                - Content-Type
                - Origin
                - X-Requested-With
                - X-Correlation-Id
              exposed_headers:
                - X-Correlation-Id
              credentials: true
              max_age: 3600
              preflight_continue: false

          - name: oauth2
            enabled: true
            config:
              scopes:
                - users:read
                - users:write
              mandatory_scope: false
              enable_authorization_code: true
              enable_client_credentials: true
              enable_implicit_grant: false
              enable_password_grant: false
              token_expiration: 3600
              hide_credentials: true
              global_credentials: false
              refresh_token_ttl: 1209600
              reuse_refresh_token: false
              accept_http_if_already_terminated: true

          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              minute: 100
              hour: 2000
              policy: local
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false
              limit_by: consumer

          minute: 300
          hour: 5000
          policy: local
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false
          limit_by: consumer

              second: 20
              minute: 200
              hour: 3000

  - name: admin-service
    url: http://admin-upstream:8080
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        enabled: true
        config:
          origins:
            - "https://admin.example.com"
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - PATCH
            - DELETE
            - OPTIONS
          headers:
            - Accept
            - Authorization
            - Content-Type
            - Origin
            - X-Requested-With
            - X-Admin-Token
          exposed_headers:
            - X-Correlation-Id
          credentials: true
          max_age: 600
          preflight_continue: false

      - name: basic-auth
        enabled: true
        config:
          hide_credentials: true
          anonymous: null

      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true
        config:
          minute: 100
          hour: 1000
          policy: local
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false
          limit_by: consumer

        paths:
          - /api/v1/admin
        strip_path: false

          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
          - OPTIONS

                - X-Admin-Token

              credentials: true
              max_age: 600
              preflight_continue: false

          - name: basic-auth
            enabled: true
            config:
              hide_credentials: true
              anonymous: null

          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              minute: 50
              hour: 500
              policy: local
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false
